etymology.description: 女(女) (nǚ, "woman") + 里(里) (lǐ, "village") = woman related through marriage by living in the same village (wife of a younger brother)
etymology.interpretation: The character 娌 combines 女(女) (nǚ, "woman"), representing the female component related to marriage, with the phonetic 里(里) (lǐ, "village"), suggesting community or familial connection, to convey the idea of a woman who is a sister-in-law.
